questionText: Disclose sales of products that are greenhouse gases.
questionKo: Disclose sales of products that are greenhouse gases.
simpleHelp: Reporting sales of products that are greenhouse gases allows a more in-depth understanding of your Scope 3 emissions and business risks associated with potential future climate-related regulation.

guidance.text:
General 
This question requests disclosure of sale of products that are greenhouse gases (GHG) reported in metric tons of the GHG sold and aggregated across your organization's reporting boundary.
These emissions count towards your Scope 3 category 11 "Use of Sold Products."
Emission of these gases inside your organizational boundary counts towards your Scope 1 emissions, for which you can report the total in CO2e in question 7.6 and provide the breakdown for in CO2e in question 7.15.1.
Sales, metric tons (column 2) 
Report your organization's total sales of GHG output product listed in column 1. Complete this column for all of your GHG output products.
If your organization has not sold this output product over the reporting year, enter 0 (zero).
Sales figures should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
guidance.textKo: 일반 This 문항 requests disclosure of sale of products that are greenhouse gases (GHG) 보고 in metric tons 의 GHG sold 및 aggregated across 귀사의 보고경계. These emissions count towards your Scope 3 category 11 "Use of Sold Products." Emission 의se gases inside your 조직경계 counts towards your Scope 1 배출량, for which you can report the total in CO2e in 문항 7.6 및 provide the breakdown for in CO2e in 문항 7.15.1. Sales, metric tons (열 2) Report 귀사의 total sales of GHG output product listed in 열 1. Complete this 열 for all of your GHG output products. 만약 귀사 has not sold this output product over the 보고연도, enter 0 (zero). Sales figures 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).

Greenhouse gases: In line with Kyoto Protocol to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC) 및 the amendment issued by the Greenhouse Gas Protocol on May 2013 the basket of greenhouse gases (GHGs) consists of: - Carbon dioxide (CO 2 ); - Methane (CH 4 ); - Nitrous oxide (N 2 O); - Hydrofluorocarbon family of gases (HFCs); - Perfluorocarbon family of gases (PFCs); - Sulfur hexafluoride (SF 6 ), and; - Nitrogen trifluoride (NF 3 ). Nitrogen trifluoride (NF 3 ) is now considered a potent contributor to climate change 및 is therefore mandated to be included in national inventories under the UNFCCC. NF 3 해야 합니다 also be included in GHG inventories under the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard, 및 the GHG Protocol Corporate 가치사슬 (Scope 3) Standard .

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.
